memory:memory/2026-04-11.md:1:30.snippet: # 2026-04-11 ## Brain Dump Session — Goals & Vision - John's core mission: build an automated AI business that works 24/7 helping small businesses in multiple ways (websites, traffic, workflow automation, payments, outreach). - Future ambition: eventually teach others how to set up similar AI-powered businesses, but not ready for that yet — still learning. - Still relatively new to this space but deeply committed — hours and hours of research, content consumption, and building. ### Timeline Goals - **6 months:** Build out the business, establish real clientele, reach several thousand dollars/month in revenue. - **5 years:** Scale to multiple millions as AI capabilities expand and his own
